title: Galician Wrap Delight
description: A fusion of Spanish and Chinese flavors in a crispy wrap. A delicious vegetarian option.
instructions: Preheat a pan to medium heat.
Marinate tofu in daring and delicate for at least 15 minutes.
Cut the marinated tofu into small pieces.
Heat a tablespoon of oil in the pan and add the tofu.
Cook the tofu for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Meanwhile, warm the wraps in the microwave for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing a portion of the tofu in the center.
Add a sprinkle of galician on top of the tofu.
Fold the wraps to enclose the filling.
